commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Hear, O our God; for we are despised: and turn their reproach upon their own head, and give them for a spoil in a land of captivity: Hear us, our God, for we are despised. Turn their insult on their own head and cause them to be despised in a land of captivity, and so on. Similar to this is that saying of the psalmist speaking about the enemies of the elect as it were in the form of one wicked man: His sorrow shall be turned on his own head: and his iniquity shall come down upon him.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Captivity. Since they have not learnt to commiserate others. (Calmet)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
